creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 203312
specinfora-2.77.0.patch

RubyGem Specinfra has been updated to 2.77.0.
Through this upgrade, FreeBSD service command processing bug that mistakes
`ntpd` and `openntpd` has been fixed.

The attached patch upgrades sysutils/rubygem-spacinfra port to 2.77.0.
Please apply to Ports Tree.
